kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser context to finalize the video, then embed it in the log/report.

test.doc: Test that required fields in event logging modals (specifically Log Planting) immediately show visual error highlights when opened, that the Save button is disabled, and that filling the fields clears highlights and enables Save.
